← All Mockups

Chat Surface Concepts

Twelve answers to "what does a Brilliance conversation look like"

The Brilli direction is the presence. The chat surface is the structure. Most AI products use bubbles. Brilliance can do better. Twelve concepts grouped by family. Static CSS visualizations only - no canvas loops, no memory cost.

How to read. Each concept is a different answer to "what is the conversation, structurally." The visual on each card is a static sketch (no animation cost). Hover over any concept for details. Read the full concept doc at docs/brilliance/11-chat-interface-concepts.md for pros/cons, voice fit, and recommendation.

Family A: Conversation as document

The chat is reading material. Old Standard TT shines.

November Domain occupancy

Three weeks remain in the booking window. Lean on the audience that converted last fall. Draft attached.

Strategy

A two-line cadence in the post copy outperforms three-line

A1.

Living Document

A growing lab notebook. Your input becomes a heading; AI's response becomes prose. No bubbles. Reads like thinking.

refinedarchival
D

earest operator,

The Domain occupancy gap in November is real. Lean into the audience that converted last fall.

A2.

Letter Series

Each exchange is a letter. Cream parchment, gold initial caps, wax seal animation when AI completes. Maximum luxury.

most luxuryslow

The brand question

How do we lean into the gap that opened in November without sounding desperate? The voice has to stay assured. The data

"Lean on the cadence that worked last fall."

Three-line posts converted at half the rate of two-line. The audience read tighter copy as more deliberate.

A3.

Magazine Column

AI responses laid out as a multi-column magazine. Pull quotes, sidebars, callouts. Conversation is being typeset live.

most distinctivecomplex
Marketing
Voice is the issue. Not the timing. Cadence tightens this season.
"How do I lean into November without losing the brand voice?"
Strategy
Audience is right. Channel mix needs Threads tilt. Hold IG steady.

A4.

Margin Notes

Talmudic layout. Your message in center. Multiple agents weigh in as marginalia. Operators see who said what.

multi-agentdense

Family B: Conversation as space

Messages live in a navigable canvas, not a linear feed.

November plan Threads Voice

B1.

Spatial Constellation

2D zoomable canvas. Messages cluster by topic. Long conversations become beautiful artifacts you navigate.

most strikingbrand-defining
How do we lean in?
Two-line cadence outperforms
Threads draft attached

B2.

Branching Pinboard

Messages are cards on a corkboard. Pin, drag, branch, fork. Best for research and multi-thread work.

investigativeworkflow-heavy

"Lean on the November cadence."

9:14
9:18
9:22
9:31
now

B3.

Time Ribbon

Horizontal scrubbing timeline. Each message a chapter mark. Edit any past moment to branch the timeline.

cinematichistory-aware

Family C: Conversation as theater

A scene with a setting. The platform has a place.

Welcome back, Jordan.

Pulse3 goals on track. 1 needs review.
BrandRowe Reserve - Bloom batch ready.
Today2 calls. Chest day. November draft.
StandingStudio set up. Brilli watching.
How can I help today?

C1.

Concierge Desk

Brilliance "checks you in" with what's relevant. You make a request; the concierge handles it or calls the right specialist.

most on-brandanticipatory
November draft
in progress...
S
B
L
A
I

C2.

Studio at Work

Chat lives inside a studio. Easel center, tools on the side, work-in-progress visible. Brilli is the studio cat.

creativethemed

Family D: Conversation as workspace

Utility-forward. The chat earns its keep on Day 1.

Conversation
November draft?

Tightening to two-line cadence; pulling November audience...

Output streaming

D1.

Split-Pane Workspace

Left: chat. Right: live artifact streaming (Studio output, generated images). Brilli sits in the gutter showing where attention flows.

most pragmaticIDE-like
"Tighten the November draft to two-line cadence."
Pulse3on track
Bloom20fresh angles
Studio7runs today
Mail4in outbox

D2.

Dashboard Chat

Chat embedded in a dashboard. Brand context cards visible: Pulse, Bloom, Studio runs. Conversation IS the command - cards react.

top pickleverage-forward

Family E: Conversation as state

Radical minimalism.

Lean on November.
Two lines, not three.

E1.

Negative Space

One message at a time. Previous collapse to a dot. Brilli is the only persistent visual element. Boldest, most distinctive.

boldestmonastic
My top 3 to prototype. D2 Dashboard Chat (top pick - utility-forward, earns keep on Day 1). A1 Living Document (refined choice - the premium thinker experience). B1 Spatial Constellation (brand-defining choice - highest visual ceiling). If forced to ship one: D2. If two: D2 + A1. If three: D2 + A1 + B1. Read docs/brilliance/11-chat-interface-concepts.md for the full rationale.

Brilliance · by RoweOS · Chat surface concepts · CSS-only (zero canvas loops)
